subcodes.first_line: Ever hath there been both the truthful and the false in the world. The Shí'ih party hath regarded itself as the most truthful and most learned among all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال صادق و کاذب هر دو در دنیا بوده حزب شیعه خود را اصدق و اعلم عالم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
